title: Subcontractor Pricing & Folder Discovery
summary: Architecture and implementation contract for subcontractor Arrowhead sheet handling, folder-based sheet discovery, and hash change-detection fixes in generate_weekly_pdfs.py.
notes: RELEVANT TO UPCOMING SUBCONTRACTOR RATE LOGIC MODIFICATION PHASE — this doc defines the current 'keep SmartSheet pricing as-is, no reversion' contract for Arrowhead sheets, explicitly states subcontractor recalculation is deferred pending a future cutoff date, and documents that revert_subcontractor_price() and _rate_new_arrowhead tables exist but are intentionally uncalled. Classified as SPEC (not DOC) because content is implementation-contract-style: function tables with 'Modify? / Do not touch' columns, env-var defaults table, data-flow diagram, and explicit constraints/invariants the code must honor. Frontmatter applyTo:'generate_weekly_pdfs.py' reinforces it scopes a single production module. Ambiguity: borderline DOC due to prose-heavy 'Bug 1/2/3' postmortem section, but the constraints + function contract tables dominate, so SPEC wins per ADR>SPEC>PRD>DOC precedence.
